signals.title: AUD/JPY — G8 Bilateral Theme + Carry
signals.text: AUD/JPY at 114.502 — AUD outperformance reaches critical thresholds as the G8 leader, supported by a +362bp OIS carry advantage over JPY. The 1.512% spread between the G8 leader and laggard confirms a dominant carry-seeking regime. Despite JPY being the weakest G8 performer, USD/JPY at 157.916 remains below the 160.00 intervention watch level. AUD/JPY strength is structurally supported by the RBA 4.35% (HIKING) vs BoJ 0.75% (ON HOLD) differential.

signals.title: GBP/USD — Volatility + GDP Headline
signals.text: GBP/USD at 1.3518 — UK Q1 Preliminary GDP beat at +0.6% QoQ provides a fundamental floor, yet options markets signal heavy hedging demand. IV at 11.0% vs HV30 at 6.8% generates a +4.2% Vol Risk Premium (VRP), indicating traders are paying a significant premium for protection relative to realized movement. COT LF net long +31,244 (65.3%) shows institutional backing, but the high VRP suggests caution near recent highs. Watch for a break of 1.3500 to invalidate the bullish GDP impulse.

signals.title: USD/JPY — Options vs Correlation Divergence
signals.text: USD/JPY at 157.916 — A strong 25d Risk Reversal of -1.62 (Saxo) reveals an aggressive institutional skew toward JPY calls (downside protection), diverging from the spot trend. This options-market caution coincides with a significant correlation break: USD/JPY vs US 10Y yield (4.48%) has collapsed to corr=+0.476 (z=-1.93σ), suggesting the pair is losing its primary macro driver. Intervention risk at 160.00 remains the primary catalyst for the downside skew despite the +287bp OIS carry advantage.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Retail Divergence
signals.text: AUD/USD at 0.7255 — Institutional vs retail divergence reaches an extreme. COT LF net long +58,994 (78.3% long) shows heavy institutional commitment, while retail sentiment is 87% short (Myfxbook). This contrarian setup suggests retail is unsuccessfully fading the institutional trend; a further squeeze higher is likely if RBA maintains its hiking bias. Watch for COT long% exceeding 80% to signal a positioning exhaustion point.
